name: aceh-export-system
description: Sistem Rekomendasi Pasar Ekspor Produk Kerajinan Aceh

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd api-gateway && npm install && cd ../services/auth-service && npm install && cd ../product-service && npm install && cd ../trend-service && npm install && cd ../recommendation-service && npm install && cd ../../frontend && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:trend" "npm run start:recommendation" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:frontend"
